completedPhaseClaims.summary: Created planning and state scaffolding from existing spec/design. No implementation, runtime tests, artifact lint, validation, or certification executed.

Added inline UI Wireframes and User Flows sections to spec.md for connector health, QF packet rendering, evidence bundle export, Telegram summary, action boundary, and schema-mismatch scenarios. No runtime code or certification fields changed.

Reconciled design.md with UX wireframes and user flows for connector status, packet search/digest/detail cards, PersonalEvidenceBundle builder, Telegram summary, schema mismatch, action boundary, accessibility/responsive behavior, authorization, and scenario-to-test mapping. No runtime source code, scopes, report, uservalidation, or certification fields changed.

Performed an additional design-only reconciliation pass after inline UX sections were reviewed. Added an explicit UX contract reconciliation matrix tying connector status, packet search/digest/detail, evidence bundle builder, Telegram summary, sync/rendering, export, schema mismatch, and action-boundary flows to active design. No runtime source, scopes, report, uservalidation, docs, or certification fields changed.

Cross-repo design reconciliation pass against quantitativeFinance/specs/063-smackerel-companion-bridge/design.md. Added target_context (required) and source_refs (optional) to PersonalEvidenceBundle Bundle Fields table; added analysis_note -> qf/decision-packet+subtype mapping to content-type table; added explicit Reserved Schemas (Not Implemented Pre-MVP) subsection naming QFApprovalAction and QFWatchSignal with pre-MVP handling rules. Added Reconciliation Notes (2026-05-03) section. No spec, scopes, report, uservalidation, runtime source, or certification fields modified.

Plan reconciliation pass (mode: reconcile) folding the 2026-05-03 cross-repo design deltas into scopes.md only. Scope 2 makes the response-level next_cursor canonical (persisted in sync_state.sync_cursor), demotes per-event QFDecisionEvent.cursor to diagnostic-only, and binds QF decision_type to Smackerel content type per the Decision Type To Smackerel Content Type Mapping table (analysis_note preserved as qf/decision-packet + Metadata.decision_subtype). Scope 4 tightens the PersonalEvidenceBundle required field set, marks source_refs optional, and adds field-set parity with QF spec 063 import validation. Scope 5 adds explicit reserved-schema handling per the design's Reserved Schemas (Not Implemented Pre-MVP) subsection (QFApprovalAction normalized as qf/approval-request diagnostic-only with Metadata.reserved=true; QFWatchSignal recorded as diagnostic log only). All scope statuses remain Not Started; no runtime source, spec, design, or uservalidation fields changed; no certification claim made.

Final plan review pass after the prior reconciliation. Tightened scopes.md evidence-bundle shorthand in Validation Checkpoints, Scope 1 DTO contract, Scope 4 scenarios, Scope 4 test titles, and Scope 4 DoD so the canonical PersonalEvidenceBundle required fields, optional source_refs semantics, and source_artifact_ids terminology are consistent throughout planning. No scope status, DoD checkbox, runtime source, spec, design, uservalidation, or certification field changed.

Repaired planning artifact shape for Scope 1 partial validation: scopes.md now exposes only Scope 1 as the active executable scope, parks Scope 2+ behind the QF wait state, adds guard-recognized Gherkin and Regression E2E planning, and registers scenario-manifest.json. No final feature completion claimed.

Stabilized the disposable test-stack lifecycle in smackerel.sh by adding flock-based serialization for test-env up/down/clean smart and PGID + SMACKEREL_E2E_CHILD_RUN_ID-based child-process termination. Resolved the documented Scope 1 broader E2E NATS startup race blocker; Scope 1 scenario-specific Go E2E tests (TestQFDecisionsConnectorHealthAppearsInLiveAPI, TestQFDecisionsConnectorSchemaMismatchDoesNotPublishTrustedArtifacts) and the full Go E2E suite PASS. Broader shell E2E suite still has 8 failing tests (test_persistence postgres volume preservation, test_compose_start /api/health readiness, test_timeout_process_cleanup runner-exit deadline, test_telegram*, test_bookmark_import, test_topic_lifecycle, test_settings_connectors) that are application-code or test-suite issues outside the Scope 1 Change Boundary and outside the bubbles.devops operational surface; routed to bubbles.implement / bubbles.test. Scope 2 work preserved verbatim on parking/041-scope-2-qf-decisions-sync-pending-qf-063 (HEAD c8d42f2) and reverted from main per Scope 1 Change Boundary. No Scope 1 DoD checkbox ticked, no scope status promoted to Done, no certification claim made.

Flipped Scope 1 status from In Progress to Done in scopes.md (Active Scope Inventory row and Scope 1 status block) per bubbles.validate REWORK_REQUIRED route_required verdict at HEAD 9021d28. All 14 Scope 1 DoD items remained [x] and certified-correct by validate; no DoD checkbox modified, no Parked Scope (2-9) status promoted, no spec/design/uservalidation/report/scenario-manifest/source files touched. Evidence ref: report.md '## Scope 1 Validation Rerun - 2026-05-07 (post-supervisor-wiring)'. completedScopes remains [] until bubbles.validate's next pass promotes it to [1]; this is the expected transient state between plan flip and validate completion.

Partial Scope 1 certification at HEAD 9021d28 after the bubbles.plan scope-status flip at 2026-05-07T19:00:00Z. Re-ran ./smackerel.sh check (EXIT=0), artifact-lint (EXIT=0), traceability-guard (PASSED, 0 warnings), regression-baseline-guard (PASSED, 0 checks failed), and state-transition-guard (EXIT=1, 14 failures — Check 5 parity now PASS at completedScopes count=1 == Done count=1; remaining 14 failures are full-feature-done gates documented as expected in the prior validation rerun: Check 4 unchecked DoD on Parked Scopes 2-9, Check 5 8 Not Started Parked Scopes, Check 6 10 missing specialist phases, Check 18 3 pre-existing G040 deferral hits in low-impact pass sections). Live-stack broader e2e proof reused from /tmp/my-broader-e2e3.log per prior validation rerun acceptance. Added 'Scope 1: Connector Configuration And QF Client Contract' to certification.completedScopes; flipped certification.scopeProgress[0] to Done with certifiedAt 2026-05-07T19:15:00Z; refreshed scopeProgress[0].notes to record partial certification context. Top-level status remains in_progress; certification.status remains in_progress; certification.certifiedCompletedPhases remains [] (full-feature phases reserved for the QF 063 unblock). Evidence refs: report.md#scope-1-validation-rerun---2026-05-07-post-supervisor-wiring, report.md#scope-1-broader-e2e-evidence---2026-05-07, report.md#scope-1-partial-certification---2026-05-07t1915z, scopes.md (plan flip lines 72 and 121).

Current-session Scope 1 certification refresh. Re-read state.json, scopes.md, report.md, scenario-manifest.json, and git status; re-ran ./smackerel.sh test e2e to completion (shell suite 35/35 PASS, go-e2e PASS, tests/e2e QF connector tests PASS, echo $? = 0); ran artifact-lint PASS, traceability-guard PASS with 0 warnings, implementation-reality-scan PASS with 0 violations, artifact-freshness-guard PASS, changed-spec done audit PASS/skipped done gates because feature remains in_progress, regression-quality-guard PASS, and regression-baseline-guard PASS. state-transition-guard remains blocked only for whole-feature promotion: Parked Scopes 2-9 unchecked/not started, missing full-feature specialist phases, and pre-existing deferral-language hits in report sections; Check 5 completedScopes parity passes for Scope 1. Scope 1 remains the only certified scope; top-level status and certification.status remain in_progress; certification.certifiedCompletedPhases remains [] and Scope 2+ remain parked behind QF 063 Scope 2 read/outbox readiness. Evidence ref: report.md#scope-1-current-session-validation-refresh---2026-05-07t201245z.

executionHistory.summary: Created scopes.md, report.md, uservalidation.md, and state.json for the pre-MVP Smackerel QF Companion Connector. No source code changed and no validation commands run.
Added UX screen inventory, ASCII wireframes, responsive/accessibility states, and mermaid user flows inline in spec.md. No implementation, runtime tests, or certification promotion performed.

Updated design.md to align active technical design with the current spec.md UX truth: connector health, QF packet cards/detail, evidence builder, Telegram summary, degraded/schema mismatch behavior, action boundaries, access matrix, and precise scenario-to-test mapping. No source implementation or certification state changed.

Reviewed spec.md UX contracts against design.md and scopes.md, then added a UX contract reconciliation matrix to design.md. Active design remains read-only for QF decisions, consent-scoped for evidence export, diagnostic-only for schema mismatches, and non-mutating for approval/execution/mandate/watch/EmergencyStop boundaries.

Cross-repo design reconciliation pass against quantitativeFinance/specs/063-smackerel-companion-bridge/design.md. Added target_context (required) and source_refs (optional) to PersonalEvidenceBundle Bundle Fields table; added analysis_note -> qf/decision-packet+subtype mapping to content-type table; added explicit Reserved Schemas (Not Implemented Pre-MVP) subsection naming QFApprovalAction and QFWatchSignal with pre-MVP handling. Added Reconciliation Notes (2026-05-03) section. Artifact lint passed. No spec, scopes, report, uservalidation, runtime source, or certification fields changed.

Plan reconciliation pass (mode: reconcile) folding the 2026-05-03 cross-repo design deltas into scopes.md only. Scope 2 promotes response-level next_cursor to canonical advancement and demotes per-event cursor to diagnostic-only; analysis_note variants normalize to qf/decision-packet with Metadata.decision_subtype preserved. Scope 4 tightens the PersonalEvidenceBundle required field set with source_refs optional and adds QF spec 063 field-set parity. Scope 5 adds explicit reserved-schema handling for QFApprovalAction (normalize to qf/approval-request diagnostic with Metadata.reserved=true) and QFWatchSignal (diagnostic log only). All scope statuses remain Not Started; no runtime source, spec, design, or uservalidation fields changed; no certification claim made.

Repaired Scope 1 planning shape for partial validation. scopes.md now has canonical Scope 1 status syntax, guard-recognized Gherkin, direct Scope 1 implementation file references, scenario-specific Regression E2E rows using existing QF test files, and a parked queue for Scope 2+. scenario-manifest.json was created. The broad E2E DoD remains open after a fresh E2E run failed during disposable NATS startup.

Final plan review pass after the prior reconciliation. Tightened scopes.md evidence-bundle shorthand in Validation Checkpoints, Scope 1 DTO contract, Scope 4 scenarios, Scope 4 test titles, and Scope 4 DoD so the canonical PersonalEvidenceBundle required fields, optional source_refs semantics, and source_artifact_ids terminology are consistent throughout planning. All scope statuses remain Not Started; no runtime source, spec, design, or uservalidation fields changed; no certification claim made.

Devops stabilization pass on the disposable test-stack lifecycle. Added flock-based serialization (smackerel_with_stack_lock + smackerel_stack_lock_file) for test-env up/down/clean smart and PGID + SMACKEREL_E2E_CHILD_RUN_ID-based child cleanup (e2e_terminate_child_process_group, e2e_terminate_marked_children, e2e_child_marker_pids) in smackerel.sh. Resolved the documented disposable-test-stack NATS startup race blocker recorded in the Scope 1 scopeProgress notes. Scope 1 scenario-specific Go E2E regressions and the full Go E2E suite PASS. Broader shell E2E suite still has 8 failing tests outside Scope 1 Change Boundary and outside the bubbles.devops operational surface; routed to bubbles.implement / bubbles.test. Scope 2 implementation work preserved verbatim on parking branch parking/041-scope-2-qf-decisions-sync-pending-qf-063 (HEAD c8d42f2) and reverted from main per the Scope 1 Change Boundary. No Scope 1 DoD checkbox ticked, no scope status promoted to Done, no certification claim made.

Repaired spec 041 planning/state shape after validation: Scope 2-9 status lines are canonical while dependency gates preserve the parked queue, G040-triggering rejection-code wording was rephrased in scopes.md/report.md, and certification.scopeProgress now tracks Scopes 1-9 without marking any scope complete. Runtime DoD remains unchecked until fresh green evidence exists.

notes: Scope 1 is partially certified and remains the only active executable planning section after the 2026-05-07 repair. Scope 2+ is parked on QF 063 Scope 2 read/outbox readiness. Overall feature remains in_progress; no final feature completion is claimed.
